frameworks.name: Humanized NbBcII10
frameworks.description: Most widely used humanized VHH framework, derived from anti-lysozyme NbBcII10. Excellent stability and expression.
frameworks.notes: Standard framework for most VHH humanization projects

frameworks.name: Humanized cAbBMP2
frameworks.description: Framework derived from anti-BMP2 camelid antibody. Good for targets requiring long CDR3 loops.
frameworks.notes: Higher thermal stability, suitable for long CDR3

frameworks.name: Universal VHH-72 Framework
frameworks.description: Broad-spectrum framework from VHH-72 (anti-SARS-CoV). Validated in multiple therapeutic contexts.

CDR2.notes: Can be shorter than conventional VH

CDR3.notes: Highly variable, often longer in VHH than VH. Extended CDR3 enables binding to concave epitopes

conserved_residues.Gly/Ala44: VHH hallmark position (Gly44 in camelid, vs Val/Leu in human VH)
